jobs.title: IT Card Management Analyst / Specialist
jobs.description:
## Descrizione

The candidate will join the IT Card Management Centre of Excellence, with cross-functional responsibilities for credit and debit card management systems.

The systems operate on cloud-native architectures in Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and support key payment processes in a highly regulated banking environment.

The role involves actively contributing to functional and technical analysis activities, supporting the evolution of application solutions and integration with core banking, payment circuits and external platforms.

## Mansioni

- Analizzare e capire i processi di Card Management: emissione delle carte, gestione del ciclo di vita, autorizzazioni, clearing & settlement, frodi e chargebacks.
- Raccogliere, analizzare e formalizzare i requisiti di business, traducendoli in specifiche funzionali e tecniche.
- Supportare il business nella definizione di soluzioni IT coerenti con i modelli operativi, regolamentari e di compliance della banca.
- Collaborare con stakeholder interni (Operations, Compliance, Risk, Security).
- Redigere documentazione funzionale e tecnica (specifiche applicative, flussi di integrazione, mappature dei dati).
- Supportare la progettazione e l’evoluzione di architetture di microservizi in un ambiente cloud.
- Collaborare con team di sviluppo interni ed esterni durante le fasi di sviluppo, testing e rilascio.
- Supportare l’analisi e la gestione di incidenti applicativi e problemi di produzione.
- Operare in un ambiente DevOps, collaborando attivamente con i team di sviluppo.
- Supportare e comprendere pipeline di integrazione continua e consegna continua (CI/CD), utilizzando strumenti di automazione (es. Jenkins).
- Utilizzare sistemi di versioning del codice (Git, Bitbucket) per la gestione della configurazione delle applicazioni.
- Fornire supporto nella risoluzione di problemi di applicazioni e infrastrutture in ambienti cloud-native e distribuiti.
- Contribuire alla stabilità, qualità e scalabilità delle soluzioni, collaborando su monitoraggio, logging e problemi di performance.
- Avere una conoscenza di base di Java e delle architetture di microservizi event-driven.

## Requisiti

- Esperienza in analisi funzionale e tecnica in ambito IT.
- Conoscenza di sistemi di pagamento con carte di credito e debito.
- Capacità di comprendere e analizzare architetture di applicazioni complesse e distribuite.
- Esperienza, anche non specialistica, in ambienti cloud, preferibilmente Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
- Residenza in Ticino o disponibilità a trasferirsi.
- Conoscenza di base di:
  - Modelli DevOps e pipeline CI/CD
  - Git / GitHub
  - Architetture di microservizi
  - Kafka o sistemi di messaging / event streaming
  - Change Data Capture
  - PostgreSQL (PGSQL)
  - Java
  - Strumenti di monitoring e logging (es. Splunk, Dynatrace)

## Nice to Have

- Esperienza in contesti bancari o finanziari.
- Conoscenza dei principali circuiti di pagamento (es. Visa, Mastercard).
- Familiarità con i servizi GCP che supportano architetture cloud-native (container, logging, monitoring).
- Conoscenza di problematiche di sicurezza applicativa e compliance (es. PCI DSS, protezione dei dati).
- Conoscenza di base di Kubernetes e degli standard di autorizzazione delle applicazioni oauth2.

## Soft Skills

- Forte approccio analitico e orientamento alla soluzione.
- Capacità di operare in ambienti complessi e regolamentati.
- Attitudine al lavoro in team multidisciplinari.
- Capacità di comunicare efficacemente con stakeholder tecnici e di business.
- Proattività e focus sul miglioramento continuo.

descriptionByLocale.de: ## Beschreibung Der Kandidat wird dem IT Card Management Centre of Excellence beitreten, mit bereichsübergreifenden Verantwortlichkeiten für Kredit- und Debitkartenmanagementsysteme. Die Systeme laufen auf cloud-nativen Architekturen in Google Cloud Platform (GCP) und unterstützen zentrale Zahlungsprozesse in einem hochregulierten Bankenumfeld. Die Rolle umfasst die aktive Mitarbeit an funktionalen und technischen Analyseaktivitäten, die Unterstützung bei der Weiterentwicklung von Anwendungslösungen und die Integration mit Kernbankensystemen, Zahlungskreisen und externen Plattformen. ## Aufgaben - Analyse und Verständnis der Card Management-Prozesse: Kartenausstellung, Lebenszyklusmanagement, Genehmigungen, Clearing & Settlement, Betrugs- und Chargeback-Management. - Sammlung, Analyse und Formalisierung der Geschäftsanforderungen, Übersetzung in funktionale und technische Spezifikationen. - Unterstützung des Geschäfts bei der Definition von IT-Lösungen, die mit den operativen, regulatorischen und Compliance-Modellen der Bank übereinstimmen. - Zusammenarbeit mit internen Stakeholdern (Operations, Compliance, Risiko, Sicherheit). - Erstellung funktionaler und technischer Dokumentationen (Anwendungsspezifikationen, Integrationsflüsse, Datenabbildungen). - Unterstützung bei der Planung und Weiterentwicklung von Microservice-Architekturen in einer Cloud-Umgebung. - Zusammenarbeit mit internen und externen Entwicklungsteams während der Entwicklungs-, Test- und Freigabephasen. - Unterstützung bei der Analyse und Verwaltung von Anwendungs- und Produktionsproblemen. - Arbeiten in einer DevOps-Umgebung, aktive Zusammenarbeit mit den Entwicklungsteams. - Unterstützung und Verständnis von Continuous Integration und Continuous Delivery Pipelines (CI/CD) unter Verwendung von Automatisierungstools (z. B. Jenkins). - Nutzung von Versionskontrollsystemen (Git, Bitbucket) zur Konfigurationsverwaltung der Anwendungen. - Unterstützung bei der Lösung von Anwendungs- und Infrastrukturproblemen in cloud-nativen, verteilten Umgebungen. - Beitrag zur Stabilität, Qualität und Skalierbarkeit der Lösungen durch Überwachung, Logging und Performance-Management. - Grundkenntnisse in Java und event-driven Microservice-Architekturen. ## Anforderungen - Erfahrung in funktionaler und technischer Analyse im IT-Bereich. - Kenntnisse im Zahlungssystem mit Kredit- und Debitkarten. - Fähigkeit, komplexe und verteilte Anwendungsarchitekturen zu verstehen und zu analysieren. - Erfahrung, auch nicht spezialisiertes, in Cloud-Umgebungen, vorzugsweise Google Cloud Platform (GCP). - Wohnsitz im Tessin oder Bereitschaft umzuziehen. - Grundkenntnisse in: - DevOps-Modelle und CI/CD-Pipelines - Git / GitHub - Microservice-Architekturen - Kafka oder Messaging / Event-Streaming-Systeme - Change Data Capture - PostgreSQL (PGSQL) - Java - Monitoring- und Logging-Tools (z. B. Splunk, Dynatrace) ## Nice to Have - Erfahrung im Bank- oder Finanzsektor. - Kenntnisse der wichtigsten Zahlungskreise (z. B. Visa, Mastercard). - Vertrautheit mit GCP-Diensten, die cloud-native Architekturen unterstützen (Container, Logging, Monitoring). - Kenntnisse in Anwendungssicherheit und Compliance (z. B. PCI DSS, Datenschutz). - Grundkenntnisse in Kubernetes und OAuth2-Standards für Anwendungsautorisierung. ## Soziale Kompetenzen - Starker analytischer Ansatz und Lösungsorientierung. - Fähigkeit, in komplexen und regulierten Umgebungen zu arbeiten. - Teamfähigkeit in multidisziplinären Teams. - Effektive Kommunikationsfähigkeit mit technischen und geschäftlichen Stakeholdern. - Proaktivität und Fokus auf kontinuierliche Verbesserung.
descriptionByLocale.fr: ## Description Le candidat rejoindra le Centre d’Excellence en Gestion des Cartes IT, avec des responsabilités transversales pour les systèmes de gestion des cartes de crédit et de débit. Les systèmes fonctionnent sur des architectures natives cloud dans Google Cloud Platform (GCP) et soutiennent des processus de paiement clés dans un environnement bancaire hautement réglementé. Le rôle implique une contribution active aux activités d’analyse fonctionnelle et technique, en soutenant l’évolution des solutions applicatives et l’intégration avec les systèmes bancaires centraux, les circuits de paiement et les plateformes externes. ## Missions - Analyser et comprendre les processus de gestion des cartes : émission des cartes, gestion du cycle de vie, autorisations, clearing & settlement, fraudes et rétrofacturations. - Recueillir, analyser et formaliser les exigences métier, en les traduisant en spécifications fonctionnelles et techniques. - Soutenir le métier dans la définition de solutions IT cohérentes avec les modèles opérationnels, réglementaires et de conformité de la banque. - Collaborer avec les parties prenantes internes (Operations, Compliance, Risque, Sécurité). - Rédiger la documentation fonctionnelle et technique (spécifications applicatives, flux d’intégration, cartographies des données). - Soutenir la conception et l’évolution des architectures de microservices dans un environnement cloud. - Collaborer avec les équipes de développement internes et externes lors des phases de développement, de test et de déploiement. - Soutenir l’analyse et la gestion des incidents applicatifs et des problèmes de production. - Travailler dans un environnement DevOps, en collaborant activement avec les équipes de développement. - Soutenir et comprendre les pipelines d’intégration continue et de livraison continue (CI/CD), en utilisant des outils d’automatisation (ex. Jenkins). - Utiliser des systèmes de gestion de versions du code (Git, Bitbucket) pour la gestion de la configuration des applications. - Apporter un support dans la résolution des problèmes liés aux applications et aux infrastructures dans des environnements cloud-native et distribués. - Contribuer à la stabilité, la qualité et la scalabilité des solutions, en collaborant sur la surveillance, la journalisation et la performance. - Avoir des connaissances de base en Java et en architectures de microservices orientés événements. ## Exigences - Expérience en analyse fonctionnelle et technique dans le domaine IT. - Connaissance des systèmes de paiement par cartes de crédit et de débit. - Capacité à comprendre et analyser des architectures d’applications complexes et distribuées. - Expérience, même non spécialisée, dans des environnements cloud, de préférence Google Cloud Platform (GCP). - Résidence dans le Tessin ou disponibilité à déménager. - Connaissances de base en : - Modèles DevOps et pipelines CI/CD - Git / GitHub - Architectures de microservices - Kafka ou systèmes de messagerie / streaming d’événements - Change Data Capture - PostgreSQL (PGSQL) - Java - Outils de monitoring et de logging (ex. Splunk, Dynatrace) ## Atouts - Expérience dans le secteur bancaire ou financier. - Connaissance des principaux circuits de paiement (ex. Visa, Mastercard). - Familiarité avec les services GCP supportant les architectures cloud-native (conteneurs, logging, monitoring). - Connaissance des problématiques de sécurité applicative et de conformité (ex. PCI DSS, protection des données). - Connaissance de base de Kubernetes et des standards d’autorisation des applications oauth2. ## Soft Skills - Forte capacité analytique et orientation vers la solution. - Aptitude à évoluer dans des environnements complexes et réglementés. - Esprit d’équipe multidisciplinaire. - Capacité à communiquer efficacement avec les parties prenantes techniques et métier. - Proactivité et orientation vers l’amélioration continue.

jobs.title: Candidatura spontanea apprendistato
jobs.description:
## Apprendistato:
- Destinatari
- Studenti brillanti che hanno terminato le scuole medie e si apprestano ad entrare nel mondo del lavoro. Ottengono il diploma al termine di una formazione duale che comprende una rotazione tra gli uffici orientata a fornire loro le necessarie conoscenze del settore.

## Durata
- 4 anni (informatica)

## Programma scolastico apprendistato informatico sviluppo applicazioni / gestione infrastrutture / sviluppo business digitale
- Formazione scolastica: profilo esteso con maturità integrata, presso il Centro Professionale Tecnico a Locarno.
- Corsi interaziendali: Ameti Bodio.

## Requisiti
- Diploma delle scuole medie con tutti i livelli attitudinali e una media superiore al 4.7.
- Spiccata motivazione, passione verso il contatto con le persone, voglia di studiare e dimestichezza con le cifre e i programmi informatici.

jobs.title: Collaboratore Servizi Logistici - Ufficio Tecnico
jobs.description:
## Descrizione

Siamo alla ricerca di un/una Collaboratore/Collaboratrice Servizi Logistici – Ufficio Tecnico per rafforzare il nostro team. In questo ruolo sarai responsabile del coordinamento e della pianificazione delle attività di manutenzione e riparazione degli edifici e degli impianti tecnici, garantendo operazioni efficienti e un servizio di alta qualità per i nostri clienti interni.

## Mansioni

- Organizzazione e pianificazione dei lavori di manutenzione e riparazione degli edifici e degli impianti tecnici
- Gestione delle richieste di intervento e comunicazione con i clienti interni
- Gestione dei processi di acquisto materiale e ordini di lavoro
- Attività di manutenzione, riparazione e altre attività in ambito logistica incluso servizio di picchetto
- Gestione e coordinamento del team di manutenzione
- Conoscenza della tecnica degli edifici (impianti elettrici, riscaldamento, impianti frigoriferi, impianti sanitari, ventilazione, reti ICT)
- Esperienza (10 anni) nella gestione, manutenzione e riparazione di edifici e impianti tecnici, incluso il servizio di picchetto
- Conoscenza di applicativi per la gestione di ticket e asset (EAM, SAP o simili)
- Buone conoscenze di sistemi di gestione edifici (Siemens, Honeywell o simili)
- Ottima conoscenza degli applicativi Office e best practice nell’utilizzo delle tecnologie (PC, App, ecc.)
- Esperienza nella conduzione di un team e nella gestione di piccoli progetti
- Orientamento verso il cliente (interno) e forte spirito per il lavoro di squadra
- Residente in Ticino
- Diploma AFC in ambito tecnico (edilizia e/o impianti) con preferenza per l’ambito elettrico, elettrotecnico o elettromeccanico. Eventuali formazioni superiori in ambito tecnico costituiscono titolo preferenziale
- Italiano (lingua madre) e buona conoscenza di una seconda lingua nazionale (preferibilmente tedesco). Buone conoscenze dell’inglese

## Cosa offriamo

*(Se ci sono dettagli su cosa offre l'azienda, inserirli qui)*

## Contatto

*(Se ci sono dettagli su come candidarsi, inserirli qui)*

descriptionByLocale.en: ## Description We are looking for a Logistics Services Coordinator – Technical Office to strengthen our team. In this role, you will be responsible for coordinating and planning maintenance and repair activities for buildings and technical systems, ensuring efficient operations and high-quality service for our internal clients. ## Responsibilities - Organization and planning of maintenance and repair work for buildings and technical systems - Management of intervention requests and communication with internal clients - Management of procurement processes and work orders - Maintenance, repair, and other logistics activities including on-call service - Management and coordination of the maintenance team - Knowledge of building technology (electrical systems, heating, refrigeration systems, sanitary systems, ventilation, ICT networks) - 10 years of experience in managing, maintaining, and repairing buildings and technical systems, including on-call services - Knowledge of ticket and asset management applications (EAM, SAP or similar) - Good knowledge of building management systems (Siemens, Honeywell or similar) - Excellent knowledge of Office applications and best practices in technology use (PC, apps, etc.) - Experience leading a team and managing small projects - Customer orientation (internal) and strong team spirit - Resident in Ticino ## Requirements - AFC diploma in a technical field (construction and/or systems) with a preference for electrical, electrotechnical, or electromechanical fields. Higher technical education is a plus. - Native Italian speaker with good knowledge of a second national language (preferably German). Good knowledge of English. ## What We Offer *(Insert company-specific benefits here)* ## Contact *(Insert application instructions here)*
descriptionByLocale.de: ## Beschreibung Wir suchen einen Logistikdienstleister – Technisches Büro, um unser Team zu verstärken. In dieser Rolle sind Sie verantwortlich für die Koordination und Planung von Wartungs- und Reparaturarbeiten an Gebäuden und technischen Anlagen, um effiziente Abläufe und einen hochwertigen Service für unsere internen Kunden zu gewährleisten. ## Aufgaben - Organisation und Planung von Wartungs- und Reparaturarbeiten an Gebäuden und technischen Anlagen - Verwaltung von Einsatzanfragen und Kommunikation mit internen Kunden - Verwaltung von Beschaffungsprozessen und Arbeitsaufträgen - Wartungs-, Reparatur- und andere logistische Tätigkeiten inklusive Bereitschaftsdienst - Leitung und Koordination des Wartungsteams - Kenntnisse der Gebäudetechnik (elektrische Anlagen, Heizung, Kälteanlagen, sanitäre Anlagen, Lüftung, ICT-Netzwerke) - 10 Jahre Erfahrung in der Verwaltung, Wartung und Reparatur von Gebäuden und technischen Anlagen, inklusive Bereitschaftsdienst - Kenntnisse in Ticket- und Asset-Management-Systemen (EAM, SAP oder ähnlich) - Gute Kenntnisse von Gebäudemanagementsystemen (Siemens, Honeywell oder ähnlich) - Hervorragende Kenntnisse der Office-Anwendungen und Best Practices im Technologieneinsatz (PC, Apps, etc.) - Erfahrung in der Teamleitung und im Management kleiner Projekte - Kundenorientierung (intern) und ausgeprägter Teamgeist - Wohnsitz im Tessin ## Anforderungen - AFC-Diplom im technischen Bereich (Bauwesen und/oder Anlagen) mit Vorzug für elektrische, elektrotechnische oder elektromechanische Fachrichtungen. Höhere technische Ausbildungen sind von Vorteil. - Muttersprache Italienisch mit guten Kenntnissen in einer zweiten Landessprache (vorzugsweise Deutsch). jobs.title: Employee Card Onboarding
jobs.description:
## Descrizione

The candidate will be responsible for implementing the payment card issuing process for corporate customers, analysing and evaluating requests, setting spending limits and activating complementary services.

The role involves direct contact with potential customers, including by telephone, in order to gather information, clarify requirements and support the customer throughout the entire process.

## Mansioni

- Answer incoming calls and handling inquiries from customers and business partners in German, French, Italian and English
- Manage payment card issuance requests for corporate customers
- Analyse and evaluate the validity of the request, verifying the customer's profile and consistency with company policies
- Request and verify the necessary documentation (e.g. corporate, financial and identification documents)
- Define the most appropriate spending limit based on customer analysis and risk level
- Enter and configure complementary services associated with the card (e.g. insurance, reporting, digital services, spending controls)
- Contact potential customers by telephone to discuss their requests in detail, provide clarification and commercial support
- Collaborate with internal teams (credit risk, operations) to ensure a smooth and effective process
- Ensure compliance with current regulations and internal procedures (KYC, AML, credit policy)

## Cosa offriamo

- Flexibility in working from home and the management of working hours in order to guarantee a healthy work-life balance
- Numerous benefits and incentives
- Well-being, motivational and team-building activities

## Requisiti

- Administrative background
- Privious experience in similar position
- Good knowledge of Office package/ PC use
- Languages: Italian / German native proficiency / Basic French / Basic English
- Customer orientation and ability to work in team
- Resident in Ticino or willing to relocate

titleByLocale.de: Risikomanager - Asset Liability Management (ALM) und Liquiditätsrisiko
titleByLocale.fr: Gestionnaire des Risques - Asset Liability Management (ALM) et Risque de Liquidité

jobs.description:
## Descrizione

The selected candidate will be responsible for managing risks related to Asset Liability Management (ALM) and liquidity risk, ensuring that the company maintains a solid financial position and can navigate market challenges effectively.

## Mansioni

- Conduct in-depth analysis of risks related to ALM and liquidity risk, identifying potential vulnerabilities and developing mitigation strategies
- Monitor the company's daily liquidity position, ensuring compliance with regulatory and internal requirements in alignment with Basel framework and FINMA ordinance
- Collaborate with treasury and finance departments to optimize liquidity management practices, including cash flow forecasting, liquidity buffer management and funding strategies/ contingency plan
- Assess and manage the company's exposure to interest rate risk in the banking book (IRRBB), developing strategies to mitigate adverse impacts on earnings and capital
- Conduct liquidity stress testing and scenario analysis to evaluate the impact of adverse market conditions on the company’s liquidity position
- Prepare detailed and accurate reports on liquidity risk and ALM for senior management, Committee, Regulators, providing clear analysis and recommendations
- Ability to work under pressure in a dynamic environment setting priorities and meet tiny deadlines

## Requisiti

- Technical Skills: Advanced knowledge of ALM and liquidity risk, interest rate risk management tools and methodologies, including scenario analysis and stress testing
- Analytical Skills: Excellent analytical skills and attention to detail, with the ability to interpret and synthesize large volumes of complex data using programming knowledge (Phyton, R, SQL)
- Communication Skills: Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to present technical information clearly and concisely to non-technical stakeholders
- Experience: At least 5 years of experience in risk management, with a particular focus on ALM/ liquidity risk or treasury department
- Languages: Italian / English native proficiency / French / German is a plus
- Professional certification in risk management (e.g., FRM, PRM) is a plus
- Resident in Ticino or willing to relocate

## Cosa offriamo

*(Sezione da completare con i benefici e le offerte dell'azienda)*

## Contatto

descriptionByLocale.fr: ## Description Le candidat sélectionné sera responsable de la gestion des risques liés à l'Asset Liability Management (ALM) et au risque de liquidité, en veillant à ce que l'entreprise maintienne une position financière solide et puisse naviguer efficacement face aux défis du marché. ## Missions - Mener des analyses approfondies des risques liés à l'ALM et au risque de liquidité, en identifiant les vulnérabilités potentielles et en développant des stratégies d'atténuation - Surveiller la position de liquidité quotidienne de l'entreprise, en assurant la conformité aux exigences réglementaires et internes conformément au cadre Basel et à l'ordonnance FINMA - Collaborer avec les départements de trésorerie et de finance pour optimiser les pratiques de gestion de la liquidité, y compris la prévision des flux de trésorerie, la gestion du buffer de liquidité et les stratégies de financement / plan de contingence - Évaluer et gérer l'exposition de l'entreprise au risque de taux d'intérêt dans le livre bancaire (IRRBB), en développant des stratégies pour atténuer les impacts négatifs sur les bénéfices et le capital - Réaliser des tests de résistance de liquidité et des analyses de scénarios pour évaluer l'impact de conditions de marché défavorables sur la position de liquidité de l'entreprise - Préparer des rapports détaillés et précis sur le risque de liquidité et l'ALM pour la haute direction, le comité et les régulateurs, en fournissant des analyses et recommandations claires - Capacité à travailler sous pression dans un environnement dynamique, en fixant des priorités et en respectant des délais serrés ## Exigences - Compétences Techniques : Connaissance avancée de l'ALM et du risque de liquidité, des outils et méthodologies de gestion du risque de taux d'intérêt, y compris l'analyse de scénarios et les stress tests - Compétences analytiques : Excellentes capacités analytiques et souci du détail, avec la capacité d'interpréter et de synthétiser de grands volumes de données complexes en utilisant des connaissances en programmation (Python, R, SQL) - Compétences en communication : Excellentes compétences en communication écrite et orale, avec la capacité de présenter des informations techniques de manière claire et concise à des parties prenantes non techniques - Expérience : Au moins 5 ans d'expérience en gestion des risques, avec un accent particulier sur l'ALM / risque de liquidité ou le département de trésorerie - Langues : Italien / Anglais langue maternelle / Français / Allemand est un plus - jobs.title: Compliance Officer Senior
jobs.description:
## Descrizione

We are seeking a highly motivated and detail-oriented Compliance professional to join our team. The ideal candidate will have solid experience in regulatory matters, particularly in AML, cross-border activities and sanctions, and will be able to provide clear guidance and practical solutions to the business. This role requires strong analytical skills, sound judgment, and the ability to manage complex cases in a dynamic and evolving regulatory environment. The candidate will play a key role in ensuring adherence to applicable regulations, supporting business initiatives, and contributing to the ongoing development of the Compliance framework.

## Mansioni

- Analysis, review and handling of cases related to AML, cross-border activities and sanctions, including the preparation of assessments and formal positions for the business
- Opportunity to analyze cases related to market abuse and product suitability, as well as FATCA and CRS matter
- Definition of Compliance requirements and supervision of their implementation within projects aimed at developing new products or services
- Drafting and review of internal policies and procedures in the Compliance area (e.g. AML, cross-border and sanctions)
- Collection of data and information for Compliance reporting addressed to senior management, as well as for periodic Compliance risk assessments
- Preparation and delivery of Compliance training
- Monitoring of regulatory developments in the Compliance area and analysis of their impact
- Handling requests from External and Internal Audit
- Execution of consolidated supervision activities in the Compliance area
- Ability to interact effectively with colleagues from different departments (e.g. Business, Operations, IT)
- Apply a critical and proactive approach in identifying new solutions
- Work independently
- Manage a high volume of cases efficiently

## Requisiti

- At least 5 years of experience in the banking sector in a similar role (Compliance Officer), preferably not limited to AML but also covering broader regulatory Compliance and advisory activities (cross-border, sanctions, reporting, Compliance risk assessment, consolidated supervision), as well as experience in overseeing Compliance-related projects
- Experience in Compliance related to market conduct (e.g. monitoring of market abuse, product suitability reviews, etc.) is considered a strong asset
- Experience in Compliance related to FATCA and CRS is considered a plus
- Languages: Italian / English native proficiency / French / German is a plus
- Resident in Ticino or willing to relocate

## Cosa offriamo

*(Sezione da completare con i benefici e le offerte dell'azienda)*

## Contatto

*(Sezione da completare con le modalità di candidatura o contatto)*

Il candidato ideale avrà una solida esperienza in ambito regolamentare, in particolare in AML, attività transfrontaliere e sanzioni, e sarà in grado di fornire indicazioni chiare e soluzioni pratiche al business. Questo ruolo richiede forti capacità analitiche, buon senso e la capacità di gestire casi complessi in un ambiente regolamentare dinamico e in evoluzione. Il candidato svolgerà un ruolo chiave nel garantire il rispetto delle normative applicabili, nel supportare le iniziative aziendali e nel contribuire allo sviluppo continuo del framework di Compliance. ## Mansioni - Analisi, revisione e gestione di casi relativi ad AML, attività transfrontaliere e sanzioni, inclusa la preparazione di valutazioni e posizioni formali per il business - Opportunità di analizzare casi relativi a abuso di mercato e adeguatezza dei prodotti, nonché questioni FATCA e CRS - Definizione dei requisiti di Compliance e supervisione della loro implementazione all’interno di progetti finalizzati allo sviluppo di nuovi prodotti o servizi - Redazione e revisione di politiche e procedure interne nell’area Compliance (es.
